summer: A photograph of a sunny summer day.
The sun is shining brightly in the summer sky.
Green trees sway in the warm breeze.
A clear blue sky stretches over the sunny land.
The hills glow under golden sunlight.
winter: A photograph of a snowy winter day.
Snow gently covers the silent landscape.
Snowflakes fall slowly through the air.
The world feels quiet under a blanket of snow.
Footprints mark a path in the fresh snow.
